title: Key takeaways from Snap's Q2 2024 performance
text:
Key takeaways from Snap's Q2 2024 performance

Revenue

Second quarter revenue increased 16% year-over-year to $1,237 million. However, this revenue fell below estimates of $1.25 billion.

Key Financial Metrics

Daily Active Users increased 9% year-over-year to 432 million, Net loss improved 34% year-over-year to $249 million, and Adjusted EBITDA improved 243% year-over-year to $55 million.

User Growth

The community grew to reach more than 850 million monthly active users in Q2, with more than 11 million Snapchat+ subscribers.

Q3 2024 Guidance

For Q3 2024, Snap expects revenue to range between $1.33-1.37 billion, representing a growth of 12-16% YoY, with DAUs expected to reach approximately 441 million.

Geographic Breakdown

Revenues from North America (62.1% of revenues) increased 11.8% year over year to $767.5 million, while revenues from Europe (18.6% of revenues) increased 26.2% to $229.8 million, and revenues from Rest of the World were $239.4 million, up 20.5% year over year.
